{{Infobox character
| name = Captain (The Last Horizon)
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Captain}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|crew on The Last Horizon, [[The Last Horizon]], [[The Zenith Starship|Zenith Starship]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Captain, leader}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, crew member}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Captain (The Last Horizon) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain is the leader of the legendary starship known as [[The Last Horizon]]. While rumors once suggested the role belonged to a human [[Archmage]] named [[Varic Vallenar]] from the [[Vallenar Corporation]], the position is held by an individual who has undergone a ritual to become a [[Sevenfold Archmage]] and has been recognized by the [[Aether]]. This role carries significant weight, as the Captain is viewed as a legendary figure capable of making a substantial impact on the galaxy and can even challenge high-ranking planetary officials. Command of the ship is not a unilateral power; instead, it involves a unique arrangement where the six crew members collectively influence the vessel's direction. Despite this shared responsibility, the Captain maintains authority and can grant permission for visitors to explore the ship's halls. The Captain's status is closely tied to the ship itself; it is suggested that if the Captain were killed, [[The Last Horizon]] would return to a dormant state. The role is also associated with significant combat history, including notable actions during the battle of the [[Thevellian System]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Serving as the leader of the crew aboard [[The Last Horizon]], the Captain undergoes several rounds of examination. During a critical moment, they direct the crew to awaken the ship's power core, an action acknowledged by [[Horizon]], who addresses them by their title. Having been accepted as the Captain of the [[Zenith]] Starship, they serve as the narrator of these events.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Captain is undergoing various rounds of examination.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Captain directs the crew and awakens the ship's power core.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] addresses the narrator as Captain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Captain is the leader of the crew on [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist has been accepted as the Captain of the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Captain is the narrator of the chapter.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|On the vessel [[The Last Horizon]], the Captain holds a role that carries a different significance than is typical. Serving as a provisional crew member, the Captain has previously failed their crews in past lives and was advised by Shyrax to select a new crew. After the [[Horizon]] re-fabricated his clothing, he began wearing a white exercise outfit featuring blue-green highlights and a seven-pointed star on the chest. During an anticipated ambush, he prepared the battlefield for the coming conflict. His survival is critical to the ship, as his death would cause the [[Horizon]] to enter a dormant state.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The position of Captain on [[The Last Horizon]] has a different significance than usual.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain is a provisional crew member.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain wears a white exercise outfit with blue-green highlights and a seven-pointed star on the chest after [[Horizon]] re-fabricates his clothes.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain is a character who has been advised by Shyrax to choose a new crew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain has failed their crew in previous lives.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Captain anticipated the ambush and prepared the battlefield.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The death of the Captain would cause [[Horizon]] to go dormant.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator is addressed as Captain by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator is the Captain of the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] addresses the narrator as Captain.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] addresses [[Varic]] as Captain.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Clad in a mantle and hood, the Captain is distinguished by eyes that blaze with a silver light. During their encounters, they wield a magical staff capable of being stored within crystal. The Captain's presence is marked by a volatile temperament, even issuing threats to initiate war against the [[Galactic Union]]. Throughout these events, they remain a central figure addressed directly by the narrator.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain has eyes that blaze silver and wears a hood and mantle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain threatens to go to war with the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain uses magic and has a staff.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain uses a staff that can be stored in crystal.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator is addressing a Captain.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Now, to the worst of all. Captain.” ... I must recommend you choose a new crew.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Yeah. I’m the Captain of the Zenith Starship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’ll go to war with the Galactic Union,” I said, still addressing the camera.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
